title: Vileda EasyWring and Clean Turbo 2-in-1 Microfibre Mop Refill Head, White/Red
features: Removes over 99% of bacteria with just water – Vileda Turbo Classic refill provides a deep-cleaning solution for all your needs at home. It effectively removes dirt and over 99% of bacteria with just water, thanks to advanced 100% microfibre technology.
1 refill = 6 months of cleaning — Save time and money with long-lasting mop head replacements. To ensure consistent cleaning power, we advise to replace the refill every 6 months.

Suitable for all hard floor surfaces — Vileda Turbo Classic spin mop refill is safe and effective at cleaning dirt and grease on all hard-surfaced floors, including finished hardwood, laminate, ceramic tile, vinyl, linoleum and more.

Compatible with all Vileda spin mop systems —Vileda Turbo Classic refill is suitable to be used with all Vileda spin mop systems including Vileda Turbo, Vileda Turbo Smart and Vileda Easy Wring & Clean.
Vileda quality – Get the most from your Vileda Turbo with genuine Vileda refills that are designed to work together and provide optimal performance.
description: From the manufacturer Vileda Turbo 2in1 refill – one refill = 6 months of cleaning With Vileda Turbo 2in1 mop refill you are able to clean any kind of hard floor surface with ease – no matter if you have ceramic tiles, linoleum or finished hardwood. Order Vileda Turbo 2in1 mop refill now! Clean floors thanks to the microfibres Vileda Turbo 2in1 mop refill is suitable to be used on all hard floor surfaces. Advanced microfibre technology the strands pick up 20% more loose dirt than comparable products. The mop head can be washed along with your daily garments at 30℃ and is suitable for all spin mop systems including Vileda Turbo, Vileda Turbo Smart and Vileda Easy Wring & Clean. Benefits Advanced microfibre technology Kills up to 99.9% bacteria with just water Easy to replace due to the click mechanism Suitable for all hard surfaces Machine washable and reusable for up to 6 months Compatible with all Vileda spin mop systems Advanced microfibre technology Thanks to our advanced microfibre technology, up to 99% of bacteria and viruses can be removed with just water* - no need for hard chemicals. Triangular shape to clean corners Due to the triangular shaped spin mop refill, you are able to reach into corners and hard to reach areas. Machine washable and reusable Vileda Turbo 2in1 mop refill can be washed at 30℃ with your daily garments. Just make sure to not include any items with zippers, as they could damage the microfibres. Easy removal of stubborn and greasy dirt The red fibres collect 20% more loose dirt and white microfibres polish the floors. Even stubborn and greasy dirt gets removed with ease. Safe for all kinds of hard floors The Vileda Turbo 2in1 mop refill can be used on any hard floor surfaces - even delicate materials like ceramic tiles and parquet. Buy once, use for 6 months Thanks to Vileda's high quality, the spin mop refill can be easily used and reused for up to 6 months, before needing a replacement. Order your Vileda Turbo 2in1 refill now! *Removes E. coli & S. aureus from hardwood floor & ceramic tile as tested at a 3rd party lab.
